---
ttitle: "Titanic Data"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-10"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
titanic <- read.csv("~/Desktop/titanic/titanic.csv")

#head(titanic)


```
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```



```{r}
titanic <- titanic %>%
  mutate(age_group = case_when(
    Age < 18 ~ "Child",
    Age <31 ~ "Young Adult",
    Age < 61 ~ "Adult",
    .default = "Senior"
  ))

titanic <- titanic %>%
  arrange(Age) %>%
  relocate(Age, Survived)

titanic %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  summarise(perc_survived = sum(Survived)/n())


  
```
